topbar.selfHosted: Self-hosted on Synology NAS ⚡ React 19 + Vite

cv.bio_p1: My name is Stéphane, a 34-year-old software developer with nearly 10 years of experience in building modern web applications. I am proficient in both front-end and full-stack environments, with solid expertise in technologies such as Angular, React, Vue.js, and Node.js.
cv.bio_p2: Used to working with Agile / SCRUM methodologies in demanding environments, I quickly adapt to existing teams and infrastructures to remain operational and productive within short timeframes. Recently settled in Haute-Savoie, I am currently looking for a permanent position (CDI) in the Geneva / Annecy region, ideally within a structured environment focused on quality, performance, and development best practices.

resume.bac: Scientific Baccalaureate + Bachelor in Computer Science
resume.university: University of the Littoral Opal Coast
resume.edu_ulco: Training in programming, algorithms, and computer systems
resume.exp_kiliba_desc: Contribution to the development of an AI-powered Marketing Automation platform using supervised learning.
resume.exp_kiliba_skill_1: Full UX/UI overhaul: accessibility and responsive optimization for a modern SaaS interface.
resume.exp_kiliba_skill_2: Bidirectional integration with Salesforce: automation of customer lifecycle management (Lead/Account/Contact).
resume.exp_kiliba_skill_3: Integration of E-commerce ecosystems (Shopify, Prestashop) for marketing lever automation (promo codes, abandoned carts).
resume.exp_kiliba_skill_4: Implementation of testing strategies (Jest, Cypress) and real-time monitoring with Datadog.
resume.exp_kiliba_skill_5: Agile development cycle (SCRUM): daily standups, ticketing, code reviews, PRs.
resume.exp_kiliba_skill_6: Implementation and securing of payment flows via the Stripe API.
resume.exp_freelance_desc: End-to-end technical support: from infrastructure consulting to development of custom SaaS and E-commerce solutions.
resume.exp_freelance_skill_1: Development of SaaS platforms and showcase websites.
resume.exp_freelance_skill_2: E-commerce data flow synchronization: interfacing SaaS tools with Prestashop (Inventory, Catalogs, Customers).
resume.exp_freelance_skill_3: Consulting and integration of business tools (ERP/CRM Dolibarr) to optimize client internal processes.
resume.exp_freelance_skill_4: Setup of professional cloud infrastructures (domain management, mail servers, etc.).
resume.exp_rdv_desc: Development of a complete ERP (operations, garage, accounting).
resume.exp_rdv_skill_1: Development of a workshop management module (repair order workflows, inventory management and billing cycle).
resume.exp_rdv_skill_2: Architecture of a standalone secure parking management app (dynamic pricing algorithms and payment gateways).
resume.exp_rdv_skill_3: Automation of the parking tunnel via computer vision: license plate recognition, real-time data orchestration and automated billing.
resume.exp_rdv_skill_4: Translation of complex business processes into smooth user journeys and high-fidelity interfaces.
resume.exp_rdv_skill_5: Design of a hybrid API architecture (Strapi/GraphQL) to ensure data interoperability between the different ERP modules.
resume.exp_neo_desc: Creation of museum touch terminals (Grand Nausicaa)
resume.exp_neo_skill_1: End-to-end management of 7 thematic interactive terminals (Cetaceans, Open Sea...), from mockup integration to inauguration
resume.exp_neo_skill_2: Creation of mini-games (Memory), interactive quizzes and educational paths optimized for family and school audiences
resume.exp_neo_skill_3: Development of React applications packaged as optimized executables for a dedicated Chromium environment (Kiosk mode)
resume.exp_neo_skill_4: Direct collaboration with the Production Manager and critical acceptance phases with the establishment management (Nausicaá)
resume.exp_neo_skill_5: On-site technical installation, hardware configuration and software maintenance of devices in real-world conditions.
resume.exp_innova_desc: President of Esport-France & Founder of Innova-Web: Creation of a digital ecosystem dedicated to regional amateur competition.
resume.exp_innova_skill_1: Design of an event SaaS platform: architecture of an automated league and tournament management system.
resume.exp_innova_skill_2: User journey engineering (UX): optimization of registration and competition tracking.
resume.exp_innova_skill_3: Fullstack development of innovative web solutions: creation of real-time scoring tools and statistical dashboards.
resume.exp_innova_skill_4: Project management and networking: organization of physical and digital events in collaboration with regional partners.
resume.exp_innova_skill_5: Riot/Steam/Valve API synchronization for real-time scoring and player data retrieval.
resume.exp_mapo_desc: Creation of custom web interfaces, mockup integration, UX/UI optimization and web platform enhancement
resume.summary_1: Senior Full-stack developer (8 years of experience), expert in the Angular/React and Node.js ecosystem.
resume.summary_2: My background, from an AI startup (Kiliba) to industrial ERP design, has built both technical and business expertise.
resume.summary_3: Specialized in translating complex business needs into scalable, secure software solutions.
resume.summary_4: Strong delivery culture: I focus on building robust interfaces, centered on user experience and high availability.
resume.points_forts_1: Advanced Angular mastery: Reactive architecture (Signals), Standalone components and optimization (@defer).
resume.points_forts_2: Flow & Payment engineering: Design of secure checkout tunnels and billing process automation (Stripe).
resume.points_forts_3: Scalable API design: Development of robust back-ends (Node.js) and real-time data orchestration (e.g. LAPI).
resume.points_forts_4: Augmented development (AI): Advanced use of LLM tools (Cursor, Claude) to speed up production and edge case coverage.
resume.points_forts_5: Agile collaboration: Used to high technical requirement environments, in close collaboration with PO/UX and QA teams.
